answer: Microsoft reported $245 billion in revenue for Fiscal Year 2024, a 16% increase driven by cloud services and other key sectors. The company's cloud revenue surpassed $135 billion, up 23% year-over-year. Microsoft's gaming division also grew by 39% to $21.5 billion.

results.title: Microsoft Fiscal Year 2024 First Quarter Earnings Conference Call
results.snippet: [](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)[](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)We expect capital expenditures to increase sequentially on a dollar basis driven by investments in our cloud and AI infrastructure.[](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)As a reminder, there can be normal quarterly spend variability in the timing of our cloud infrastructure buildout. [](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)In Office Commercial, revenue growth will again be driven by Office 365 with seat growth across customer segments and ARPU growth thru E5.[](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)[](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)We expect Office 365 revenue growth to be roughly 16% in constant currency.[](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)We’re excited for Microsoft 365 Copilot general availability on November 1 and expect the related revenue to grow gradually over time. [](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)In Office consumer, we expect revenue growth in the mid-single digits, driven by Microsoft 365 subscriptions. [](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)For Intelligent Cloud we expect revenue to grow between 17 and 18%, or $25.1 to $25.4 billion US dollars. [](https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/investor/events/fy-2024/earnings-fy-2024-q1)Revenue will continue to be driven by Azure which, as a reminder, can have quarterly variability primarily from our per-user business and from in-period revenue recognition depending on the mix of contracts.

results.title: Earnings call: Microsoft's CEO announced annual revenue ...
results.snippet: All-up, annual revenue was more than $245 billion, up 15% year-over-year. And Microsoft Cloud revenue surpassed $135 billion, up 23%. Before I

results.title: How Microsoft Makes its Billions 💵 - Voronoi
results.snippet: How Microsoft Makes its Billions 💵 - Voronoi. # How Microsoft Makes its Billions 💵. How Microsoft Makes its Billions 💵. * Microsoft, the world's second-largest company by market cap, generates most of its revenue from its server products and cloud services division, totaling **$97.7 billion** in the fiscal year ending in June 2024. * Office products and cloud services brought in **$54.9 billion**, increasing by roughly $10 billion since 2022. * Gaming stood among the fastest-growing revenue sources, growing by 39% to reach **$21.5 billion**, driven by Xbox and Activision Blizzard sales. ### Microsoft Revenues Climb 16% in 2024. With $245 billion in revenues, Microsoft powers its business through a wide range of revenue streams, with its flagship cloud services business driving 40% of the total. Driven by growth in cloud revenue, office products, and gaming, Microsoft reported net income of $88.1 billion in 2024, posting an impressive 22% annual increase.
